info.title: SDKWork BirdCoder App API
info.description: BirdCoder app SDK source of truth generated from the canonical coding-server OpenAPI app surface.

tags.name: platform

parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key scoped to the authenticated principal and operation.

503.description: Project runtime-location verification target is unavailable.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free target locator. Do not provide a relative or absolute filesystem path.

absolutePath.description: Write-only absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

displayName.description: Safe display label for the registered location.

maxStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

usedStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free runtime target locator. It is not a filesystem path.

displayName.description: Safe display label for this location.

hasAbsolutePath.description: Whether encrypted absolute path material is registered. The path itself is never returned.

gitRepositoryUrl.description: Credential-free sanitized Git repository URL reported by a trusted target.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.
Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

budgetAmount.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

sandboxId.description: Opaque Drive sandbox identifier. This reference does not grant Drive access.

rootEntryId.description: Opaque Drive entry identifier selected as the project root.

logicalPath.description: Canonical sandbox-relative path using forward-slash segments. Empty means the sandbox root.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

BirdCoderProjectWorkspaceBinding.description: BirdCoder-owned binding to a Drive sandbox directory. Physical paths, provider roots, browser handles, and Tauri paths are never stored or returned. Every filesystem operation must authorize against Drive again.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free target locator. Do not provide a relative or absolute filesystem path.

absolutePath.description: Write-only replacement absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

displayName.description: Safe display label for the rebound location.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

maxStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.
